message:
style: rustfmt normalization across frankenterm-core + mux + cell

Comprehensive rustfmt pass across 125+ files in the frankenterm
workspace, triggered by the Rust 2024 edition formatter defaults.

Changes are exclusively whitespace/formatting with zero logic changes:

- lib.rs: alphabetical sorting of all `pub mod` declarations
- Method chain reformatting: long chains broken onto separate lines
  per the new default max_width rules
- Struct literal reformatting: single-field structs collapsed to
  single lines, multi-field structs expanded consistently
- Match arm reformatting: pattern destructuring and body alignment
- Assertion macro formatting: multi-line assert!/assert_eq! with
  closing paren on dedicated line
- Trailing whitespace and blank line cleanup throughout
- Import statement reordering (alphabetical within groups)

Affected areas:
- frankenterm-core/src/: 44 source files
- frankenterm-core/tests/: 62 test files (mission_*, proptest_*, etc.)
- frankenterm-core/benches/: 7 benchmark files
- frankenterm/src/main.rs: robot_tx match arm formatting
- frankenterm/cell/src/lib.rs: bitfield macro formatting
- frankenterm/mux/src/: tab.rs, layout.rs, tmux.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
